_curator_notes: Curated 2026-05-07: populated FAIL_TO_PASS with the 5 new/updated unit tests inside the macros crate (light_pdas::light_account_keywords + light_pdas::accounts::light_account modules) that the canonical patch adds. These run inside `cargo test -p light-sdk-macros --lib` and exercise the parser-level boolean-flag behaviour described in the instruction. The 2 integration tests in d10_ata_idempotent_test.rs need solana-test-validator + clang-linked builds and were intentionally excluded — same reasoning as the sibling task-a3ba62 fix. Switched to --lib to avoid pulling in slow integration-test compile.
